newsitems.title: Apple Crumble is announced!
newsitems.author: Joni
newsitems.contents: Hello,You are cordially invited to your grandma’s 84th birthday party. The only problem? Someone is here to murder her...But WHO?---That’s the premise of our next game Apple Crumble, announced today! After having a ton of fun making two Duck Detective cases, we wanted to create a thriller set in a fresh setting, all while keeping the core elements that we love in our games: sharp writing, quirky but loveable characters, and of course solving mysteries!So this time we are making a Knives Out-inspired mystery thriller. Set during a chaotic family birthday gathering, you need to work the room, reconnect with your family, and figure out who’s here to knife your nan.The guestlist includes:Your beloved grandmaYour stressed-out mumYour midlife crisis uncleThe weird man in your bedroomYou Just like Duck Detective, our new game will be between 60 and 90 minutes long and fully voiced with an amazing voice cast 🙂Today we showed the first teaser trailer of Apple Crumble in Day of the Devs. Stay tuned - we’ve got further surprises coming :D We also now have a newsletter, so if you want just the most important info you can subscribe here: https://preview.mailerlite.io/forms/2100347/178937266199070278/share We can’t wait to show you more! In the meantime, stay sharp.~ Happy Broccoli Team
